title: additional features
description: adds some more details and features into the game.
body:
adds a few features and details that aren't in the vanilla game.
(NOTE: note that i am indeed an idiot and new to modding, there WILL be bugs, and if you do please tell me about them and i will try to fix it as soon as i can!)




features:
potion of glowing (name says all),
potion of decay (basically a withering potion, this does exist, but it's exclusive to bedrock),
LOCAL trader (basically a version of the wandering trader that's actually a villager profession, but doesn't spawn naturally),
chef profession (name says all),
fries,
sandwich (accidentally misspelled it in the game),
pizza,
pizza slice,
potion of saturation,
potion of levitation,
novice's degree,
basic degree,
intermediate degree,
expert's degree,
master's degree,
expensive process to make the command block(s),
paranoia effect,
door song (removed song from minecraft, but i added in cause it's really good)


wip:
unhealthy and healthy effects,
lethal injury effect,
ancient totem,
ancient deepslate

planned to be added:
miner profession

made with mcreator
